description: Legal deed written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. On parchment. Almost nothing is left. The name of some of the other signatories may be recovered. Somebody (Goitein or Friedman?) added the year range 1105–32 to the manuscript in pencil; but it is not clear what this could be based on apart from Ḥalfon's years of activity (1100–38).
description_he: שטר משפטי שנכתב וחתום בידי חלפון בן מנשה, על קלף; כמעט כלום לא נותר; כנראה 1105–1132 לספירה לפי שנות פעילותו
